_meta.generated_for: occupancy + lead-conversion KPI card drill-downs (data only, no UI)
_meta.source: nectar.history.monthly_history() -- MSR replay via date= param, cached month-end snapshots (snapshots/history_<key>.jsonl) + one live call per facility for the current in-flight month. Nectar API only, no Supermetrics.
_meta.note_channel_mix: leads_web/phone/walk_in/other are real MSR lead-source counts. Per-channel CONVERSION rate is not available from the MSR and is NOT fabricated here -- only total conversion_pct is real.
_meta.note_rollup_math: brand/portfolio occupancy_*_pct and conversion_pct are SUM(numerator)/SUM(denominator) across member facilities for that month (never an average of per-facility percentages).
